affected_pattern: High-tier 5G customers show 10x volumetric usage same day as network capacity upgrade
root_cause: 5G speed uplift without plan uplift — a RAN software upgrade increased peak throughput, and customers on flat-rate-with-soft-cap plans consumed proportionally more, pushing them past cap into premium rates.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: Speed-Uplift-Without-Plan-Alignment pattern
RAN config note confirms peak throughput cap raised from 200 to 1000 Mbps
Spike magnitude correlates with customer device 5G capability
recommended_action: Retroactively raise the soft cap for the upgrade month
Offer cap-upgrade migration path to affected customers
Align network-upgrade and plan-upgrade change management going forward
Add a pre-upgrade billing-impact assessment to RAN change process
